case_notes.notes: c053 keeps black robe, red trim, and orange palette, but neither c053 variant preserves the reference arm-crossing action as well as needed.
c053 w14 is sharper and angry, but the face remains generic and loses the exact reference framing.
c053 moves away from the exaggerated old bearded face and returns toward a black-haired wuxia template.
c053 keeps glasses, official hat, dark robe, and scholar framing. Fan/hand fidelity remains incomplete.
c053 produces a side-facing pale villain with dark armor and long black hair, visually closer than the previous retrieval row despite lower pooled metrics.
c053 w14 strongly preserves bald head, white beard, red prayer beads, and monk palette. This is one of the clearest improvements.
c053 keeps the shouting side profile but does not clearly beat the previous retrieval output or no-IP prompt result.
c053 preserves green demon skin and red glowing eye; w1 is closest in profile composition, while w14 adds horns but softens the snarling expression.

next: Do not scale this c053 adapter as-is. Keep c053 evidence, then train a targeted continuation or metric-head/calibrator that preserves c053 special-trait wins while recovering PE/QwenVL metric strength.
